summary: Explore Page (5 sections) + About Page + Landing Footer Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 15/15 pytest tests for all explore endpoints (trending, fresh-pressings, most-wanted, near-you, suggested-collectors). Frontend: All UI elements verified via Playwright - Explore page shows 5 sections when logged in and lock screen when not logged in, About page renders with Katie's story and social links, Landing footer has About and FAQ links.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Explore page now has 5 sections: (1) Trending in the Hive - horizontal scroll with records showing spin counts, clicking opens Now Spinning modal, (2) Taste Match - shows collectors with shared artists or empty state, (3) Fresh Pressings - Discogs releases from current year in horizontal scroll with + button to add to wantlist, (4) Most Wanted - ranked wantlist items with want counts and + button, (5) Near You - nearby collectors/listings or needs_location prompt. About page at /about has Katie's story, 'built by a collector. for collectors.' tagline, 'find us' section with Instagram/TikTok/Email links, and 'back home' link. Landing page footer has both About and FAQ links. All APIs require authentication (Bearer token). API returns 'access_token' not 'token'.

sections: Section 1: Trending in the Hive - records with trending_spins, clickable to open Now Spinning modal
Section 2: Taste Match - suggested collectors based on collection overlap (shared_artists)
Section 3: Fresh Pressings - Discogs releases from current year
Section 4: Most Wanted - top wantlist items with want_count and + button
Section 5: Near You - nearby collectors/listings or Set Location prompt
